liveChromeVerification.Paradise | Türkiye: Existing clan layout is visible with tickets, boosts, events, training/tryout, wars, main-line and roster channels.
liveChromeVerification.Fieel's Community: Existing layout is community/Fima oriented with rules, joins, announcements, updates, uploads, Fieel info, reaction roles, Fima Macro, support, social and voice channels. No ranking/challenge structure was observed in the visible list.
liveChromeVerification.TSBTR Yedek: Existing rules, role-guide, welcome, blacklist, announcements, applications, tickets, events, tryouts and general channels were visible. The rules channel opened at its beginning and contained no posted rule panel.
liveChromeVerification.privacy: Read-only inspection only. No user-account message or destructive Discord action was performed.
liveChromeVerification.limit: This is a live structure check, not a claim that every channel history, pin and old message was read.

rule: Main servers remain unchanged until the matching exact typed owner confirmation is received.
